features: Perfume with Vanilla Notes for Women – A sweet, floral fragrance with a delicate vanilla base, perfect for everyday wear or special occasions.
Long-Lasting & Mild – Enjoy a fragrance that lingers gently on your skin throughout the day without being overpowering.
Floral Top Notes – Featuring sugar, flowers, and rose for a sweet and refreshing opening.
Heart Notes of Jasmine & Honey – A soft and elegant combination that adds depth and warmth.
Base Notes of Vanilla & Fruity Accents – A rich, smooth finish that enhances the scent’s longevity.
description: Product Description Discover the Enchantment of Rose Vanilla Indulge in the perfect harmony of floral and sweet notes with Ajyad Rose Vanilla Perfume for Women . This luxurious fragrance brings together the delicate essence of Arabian Rose and the warm sweetness of Vanilla . Soft and enchanting, it’s crafted for women who appreciate a gentle yet captivating scent that lingers beautifully on the skin. Why Choose Ajyad Rose Vanilla Perfume? Embrace the sweetness of roses intertwined with the rich, comforting aroma of vanilla . This unique blend creates a fragrance that is not only divine but also long-lasting, offering a soft and lingering presence throughout the day. The sweet yet soft notes of rose and vanilla create a captivating aura that’s perfect for any occasion. Whether it’s a romantic evening or a casual day out, this scent elevates your presence with its smooth and mild appeal. Enjoy a luxurious fragrance experience at an affordable price. The 100 ML EDP offers excellent value , providing you with an elegant perfume without compromising on quality or longevity. Key Features of Rose Vanilla Fragrance Type : Sweet floral perfume with a blend of Arabian Rose and Vanilla . Scent Profile : A mild, smooth scent with soft, lingering sweetness. Longevity : Long-lasting fragrance that stays with you all day. For Every Occasion : Ideal for both day and evening wear. Affordable Luxury : High-quality perfume at an affordable price. Top Notes : Sweet floral notes of Arabian Rose . Heart Notes : Warm, soothing Vanilla that adds depth and character. Base Notes : A smooth, lingering blend that leaves a subtle, sensual trail. What Customers Say “ Ajyad Rose Vanilla is the perfect balance of sweet and floral . The rose is delicate, and the vanilla adds a warm, inviting sweetness. It’s not overpowering but stays with me all day. I love how affordable it is for such a high-quality perfume!” Women who love sweet floral perfumes . Anyone seeking a long-lasting , affordable luxury fragrance. Those who appreciate the gentle, smooth aura of rose and vanilla combined. FAQ Of Rose Vanilla Perfume What does the Rose Vanilla perfume smell like? The Rose Vanilla perfume offers a beautiful blend of sweet floral notes from Arabian Rose combined with the warm richness of Vanilla . The fragrance is soft, smooth, and mild, with a sweetness that lingers on the skin, creating a sense of gentle attraction. Is this perfume long-lasting? Yes, A jyad Rose Vanilla Perfume is designed to be l ong-lasting. The fragrance is an Eau de Parfum (EDP), which means it contains a higher concentration of perfume oils, allowing the scent to stay on your skin for hours. Is this perfume good for both day and night wear? Absolutely! The fragrance’s soft and sweet notes make it versatile for both daytime and evening wear. It’s light enough for daily use but has the warmth and depth that make it perfect for special occasions or night outs. FAQ Of Rose Vanilla Does the perfume have a strong scent? No, the fragrance is mild and smooth , not overpowering. The sweetness of rose and vanilla creates a soft, elegant scent that gently lingers on the skin without being too strong. Can this perfume be worn in all seasons? Yes, the Rose Vanilla Perfume is suitable for all seasons. Its floral and vanilla notes are perfect for both spring and summer , while the warmth from the vanilla makes it equally enjoyable during fall and winter . What makes this perfume unique compared to other rose perfumes? What sets Ajyad Rose Vanilla Perfume apart is its distinct blend of sweet Arabian Rose and warm Vanilla . While many rose perfumes focus solely on floral notes, the addition of vanilla creates a deeper, richer scent that is both unique and elegant.
